articles.title: Countries Work Together to Lower Oil Prices
articles.summary: A group of seven rich countries, called the G7, is planning to release oil from their reserves to help lower high oil prices. Oil prices have gone up because of a war between the US, Israel, and Iran, which has stopped oil exports through a key waterway and reduced production. The International Energy Agency (IEA) is helping with this plan and might release a huge amount of oil, more than it did during the Ukraine war. By using their stored oil, these countries hope to make oil cheaper for people who need it for things like heating and transportation. However, some experts say this is only a temporary fix and won't solve the problem for long. The G7 energy ministers agreed to support this action to address the situation.

articles.title: The True Story of Kinky Boots: From Shoes to Show
articles.summary: Steve Pateman had a shoe company that was having money problems in the 1990s. To save it, he started making high-heeled shoes for men who wanted to wear them, like transgender people and drag artists. This true story became very popular. It was made into a BBC documentary, a movie in 2005, and a musical on stage in London and New York. The musical has songs by Cyndi Lauper. Now, a new version of the musical is coming to the London Coliseum with stars from TV shows. Steve says everyone asks him about the real story behind it. He is happy that it helps his town, Northamptonshire, get attention. There might even be a TV series about it in the future if they can get enough money.

articles.title: A Designer Wins a Name Battle Against a Singer
articles.summary: An Australian designer named Katie Perry won a big court case against the famous singer Katy Perry. They have similar names, but the court said the designer did not hurt the singer's reputation or confuse people. Katie Perry started her clothing brand in 2007, using her real name. The singer Katy Perry is very well-known in Australia, so people would not mix them up. The designer was happy because she believes trademarks should protect all businesses, big or small. The singer's team said they never wanted to stop the designer's business. This case was about selling clothes under the Katie Perry brand and the singer's merchandise during a tour. The designer first heard of the singer in 2008 and was just building her fashion business with her own name.

articles.title: A Math Idea That Helped Discover Tiny Particles
articles.summary: Long ago, a man named William Rowan Hamilton had a clever idea about math. He lived in Ireland and carved a formula on a bridge in 1843. But his important work happened earlier when he was young. He created math to study how light rays move and how objects like balls move. He thought light might be made of tiny particles, like Isaac Newton believed. Later, scientists found that light can act like both waves and particles. About 100 years after Hamilton, scientists used his math to help create quantum mechanics, which explains how tiny things in the universe work. This shows how old ideas can lead to new discoveries in science.

articles.title: Meghan's Special Girls' Weekend in Australia
articles.summary: Meghan, the Duchess of Sussex, is going to a fun weekend event in Sydney, Australia, for women only. The event is called a 'girls' weekend' and costs a lot of money, starting at £1,400 per person. It will happen in April when Meghan and her husband, Prince Harry, visit Australia. At the event, Meghan will speak at a dinner, and some people can get front-row seats and a photo with her. The event is organized by a podcast called Her Best Life, and it includes activities like yoga, talks, and a disco. Meghan likes the event because it helps women grow and be their best selves. This trip is for private, business, and charity work.

articles.title: Turning Old Car Aluminum into New Car Parts
articles.summary: Scientists have found a way to reuse old aluminum from cars to make new car parts. When cars get old, their aluminum body panels are often thrown away because they are too dirty to use again. This is a problem because aluminum is important for making things like energy systems and new vehicles. Researchers at Oak Ridge National Laboratory created a new material called RidgeAlloy. They melt down the old aluminum and mix it to make it strong and safe for car parts. This helps save energy and reduces waste. By 2030, many cars with aluminum will be old, so this new method can turn scrap into useful material for making new cars in the United States.
